creator: lintux@lintux.cx
text:
Could someone please put these two packages in the ports tree? One of them exists already (and is maintained by me) but I can't generate a patch (don't have the original version anymore), the other is new.

I put the two tgz's in a tar at:

http://www.algoritme.nl/static/bsd.tar

TIA,

Wilmer van der Gaast.
